basic_details.job_title: TISS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Recruitment 2026: Tata Institute of Social Sciences has released the official notification for 1 Senior Research Officer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Social Sciences, Ph.D. preferred
qualification.details: Masters in Social Sciences (Social Work, Sociology, Social Sciences or Law). Ph.D. or near completion preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss: Masters in Social Sciences, Ph.D. preferred

content_sections.heading: TISS Senior Research Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TISS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TISS Senior Research Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: TISS Senior Research Officer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Senior Research Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Research Officer post at TISS is July 5, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Social Sciences, such as Social Work, Sociology, Social Sciences, or Law. A Ph.D. or being near completion of a Ph.D. is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the TISS Senior Research Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Research Officer position announced by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the TISS Senior Research Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Officer position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the TISS Senior Research Officer recruitment must be submitted online only.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ADVT/TISS/PROJECT/PRAYAS/JUNE/2026.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is this job located?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
